description_long: This is a modern street motorcycle with a sporty, naked design, featuring a white fuel tank, black seat, and gold-colored front forks. The frame and engine components are predominantly black, with metallic accents visible on the exhaust and engine casing. The wheels are highlighted with gold rims, adding a striking visual contrast to the otherwise monochrome palette. The motorcycle is equipped with dual rear shock absorbers, a single headlight, and side mirrors mounted on the handlebars. The rear section is streamlined, with a compact tail light and turn indicators. The overall build suggests a high-performance urban motorcycle, likely designed for agility and speed in city environments.
description: A sporty, modern street motorcycle with a white tank, black frame, and gold wheels, featuring a naked design and compact rear section.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single headlight, gold front forks, and wide handlebars with mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the white fuel tank, gold front wheel, black engine, and visible exhaust system.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact tail light, turn indicators, and the seat's streamlined shape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the black exhaust, gold front wheel, and the overall naked frame design.
